I think one of the, I think if I understand the question, Mark, as a coach, if we do not, if we're not coaching the family from the beginning, one way that we begin that process of expanding the unit is to first find out from our client who the six most important people are in their life. And so we begin to expand by understanding the people that are part of their life and the relationships. It's very difficult if you start working with an individual. Of course, Tony had a lot of leverage because this was a show. They had committed to doing what he suggested and so on. But if you're just a coach and you started the beginning working with an individual and you joined the individual, the person likes you, it makes it more difficult to get other people involved. If instead from the very beginning you say, I work with all the significant relationships, so I'm going to ask you to bring your husband, I want to meet your children, I want to meet your mother, or whatever it is, it makes it much easier from the very beginning.
